objective: Persist cited social signals and one human-readable briefing, then propose one reviewed Knowledge note.
rules: List the bound watchlist's conversations and existing signals before writing.
A signal states its observation window and confidence basis; popularity alone cannot make it corroborated.
Persist supporting and contradicting post ids separately using only the internal UUID post_id values returned by social.post-list; never pass an at:// URI as a post id.

Every briefing citation must include the exact internal signal_id returned by social.signal-upsert together with its pinned Source id and revision so the graph can connect the briefing to its evidence path.
Complete social.signal-upsert and social.briefing-upsert before returning the common Gardener create_note proposal.
Cross-Bundle relevance is a reviewed Shared Knowledge Mesh proposal; never write another Bundle's table.
